_comment: Negative fixture for PRD-103-R2 (etag value-shape). Two illegal forms: (a) leading/internal whitespace; (b) non-base64url characters such as `+`, `/`, or `=` padding. The schema pattern `^[a-z0-9]+:[A-Za-z0-9_-]+$` rejects all three.

cases.reason: non-base64url-safe char `+` (this is standard base64; the recipe requires base64url per RFC 4648 §5)
non-base64url-safe char `/` (this is standard base64; the recipe requires base64url per RFC 4648 §5)
padding `=` is forbidden — the recipe specifies no padding
algorithm prefix MUST be lowercase ASCII; `S256` is not the canonical form

expected_finding.missing: etag value violates the value-shape pattern `^[a-z0-9]+:[A-Za-z0-9_-]+$` (whitespace, non-base64url chars, padding, or uppercase algorithm prefix)
